guidelines: Provide an at-a-glance overview of key metrics
Use cards to group related information
Include navigation for deeper exploration of data
Support data refresh and real-time updates visually
colorGuidance: Neutral background with white or elevated cards
Use semantic colors for status: green (up), red (down), amber (warning)
Single brand accent for primary actions
typographyGuidance: Metric values: 24-36px, bold, monospace or tabular figures
Metric labels: 12-14px, muted color, uppercase optional
commonMistakes: Showing too many metrics without hierarchy
Missing loading and empty states for data cards
Inconsistent card heights in the same row
No responsive behavior for the metric grid
qualityChecklist: Key metrics are immediately visible without scrolling
Color coding is consistent and has non-color alternatives
Layout adapts to different screen sizes
